title: Rachmaninoff Songs
description: Intimate interpretations of Sergei Rachmaninoff's vocal masterpieces.
body: A collection of Rachmaninoff's most poignant and beautiful songs. Vitaly Yushmanov's deep understanding of the Russian language and musical tradition brings these works to life.
tracks: Rachmaninoff: In the Silence of the Secret Night
Rachmaninoff: Do Not Sing, My Beauty
